prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis of acrolein was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`) in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1.

The calculation predicts that the most electrophilic site (most susceptible to nucleophilic attack) is the carbon atom at index 3, with a Fukui(+) index of 0.64232. The most nucleophilic site (most susceptible to electrophilic attack) is the oxygen atom at index 0, with a Fukui(-) index of 0.39389.

The calculation was performed using the PySCF backend, and no warnings were reported.
